fixtureDescription: Mixed Korean-English Konglish text with English loanwords
passage: 오늘 English class에서 presentation을 했는데 정말 nervous했어요. Teacher가 feedback을 주셨는데, pronunciation은 좋지만 vocabulary가 부족하다고 하셨어요. 그래서 오늘부터 매일 reading practice를 하려고 해요. 특히 academic words를 많이 외워야 할 것 같아요. Study group 친구들이랑 같이 하면 더 재미있을 것 같아요.

items.definition: the activity of regularly reading texts to improve language skills
a group of people who meet regularly to learn or study together
words commonly used in formal educational or scholarly contexts
a lesson or course focused on learning the English language
feeling worried or anxious about something
comments or advice about how well someone is doing
the way in which a word or language is spoken
the body of words used in a particular language or subject
repeated exercise to improve a skill
a talk or demonstration given to an audience
